changelog:
v1.4.1 — BLE prov bug fix
- WIFI_PROV / /wifi_prov now force reset_provisioned=true so BLE actually starts
- v1.4.0 returned 'active:true' but skipped BLE advertising because hub already had saved creds
- After upgrading, triggering BLE prov clears NVS creds and brings BLE up so the phone can pair
